problem id: dae576ce
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6) OR SHL(2)

examples:
  10010001 -> 01100100
  11000100 -> 00110001
  00000000 -> 00000000
  00100001 -> 11001100
  11000101 -> 01110101
  01000100 -> 00010001
  10011010 -> 11101110
  10011000 -> 01100110

query: 00010000
predicted answer: 01000100
